subject: Whiscash, a large blue catfish-like Pokemon with a round body, wide mouth, and long barbel whiskers, resting on a murky underwater floor
description: A large round-bodied blue catfish Pokemon rests on the sandy or muddy floor of a body of water. Its wide, flat face features prominent barbel whiskers extending outward, and its plump body tapers toward a striped tail. The setting is murky and dim, with diffused underwater light filtering from above through bluish-brown water. The creature looks settled and unbothered, like a predator that owns the bottom of the swamp.
